emitterParams.note: Target realization for Gemma 3 1B lm_head_gemv decode step (N=262144 vocab, K=1152 hidden, M=1). Output C is pe_sliced on the output-column axis (axis 0) with shards=256: 1024 cols/PE × 4 bytes = 4 KiB per PE, leaving ample headroom under the ~48 KiB working budget. Activation vector A is 1152 × 4 = 4.5 KiB, pe_replicated across the 256-wide row. Weight matrix B at 262144 × 1152 × 2 bytes = ~576 MiB must be fabric_streamed; chunkBytes=65536 matches the embed fixture's wse3 convention. Uniform binding u is host_copied per launch. The k-axis reduction is PE-local (each PE owns all K for its 1024 columns), so the reduction tree is linear with no fabric allreduce — matches the bootstrap fused_gemv pattern at larger shape. Host I/O shape: A broadcast-tiled to all PEs, C gathered from 256 PEs × 1024 f32 = N f32. See lm_head_gemv.notes.md for the per-PE budget math and planner decision rules this realization exercises.
